text.tspan: Martinez is not a hunch. He is in

g.text: EPL 2025/26 | qualifying keepers with 5+ starts | ranked by xGA - goals conceded
Data source: Understat | Calculated from keeper starts, match xGA, goals conceded and xPTS
Positive xGA-GA = team conceded fewer than expected in that keeper's starts. Understat does not provide post-shot xG/saves.
